action.reasoning: Observation: Current best mIoU=0.2886 from 1 epoch of training. Local val was 0.3970 but official eval gave 0.2886 - gap likely due to resolution difference (local eval at 512x512 vs official at original res). Time remaining: ~1.66h, 4 iterations left. Analysis: Most impactful action is training more epochs. Also, multi-scale inference in predict.py should help close the resolution gap. Decision: Resume training for 1 epoch (~64 min) and submit eval with improved multi-scale predict.py.
